title: Inscription On A Fountain
content:
For Dorothea L. Dix.


    Stranger and traveller,
    Drink freely and bestow
    A kindly thought on her
    Who bade this fountain flow,
    Yet hath no other claim
    Than as the minister
    Of blessing in God's name.
    Drink, and in His peace g
meaning:
"Inscription On A Fountain" is a quintessential example of John Greenleaf Whittier's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
